hero.title:
The First Fully
Automatic Call
hero.description: Focus on CS and objectives. Voice League detects your match and moves you to a voice channel with your team instantly.

monitoring.title: Real-Time Match
monitoring.description: Smart monitoring via Riot API to identify the exact moment the Nexus needs you.

dynamic.title: Zero Visual Clutter
dynamic.description: Channels created on demand that disappear after the Nexus falls. Always a clean server.

autojoin.title: Smart Auto-Join
autojoin.description: We identify your team and bring you together automatically. No clicks, just strategy.

howItWorks.title: Summoner Commands
howItWorks.setupOnce: ✨ **One-Time Setup:** You only need to set it up once, and Voice League handles everything forever.
howItWorks.discordNote: ⚠️ **Attention:** All commands below must be typed in the official **Voice League** server chat.
howItWorks.antiGhosting: 🛡️ **Fair Play:** Following Riot Games guidelines and to prevent ghosting, the bot only initiates the connection after Champion Selection ends.

step1.title: /register
step1.description: Link your <cmd>Riot IDs</cmd> (Ex: Faker#KR1). The bot monitors all your connected accounts simultaneously.

step2.title: /autojoin
step2.description: Enable or disable automatic entry. You decide when the bot takes control on its own.

step3.title: /status & /unregister
step3.description: Check your monitoring status or remove all your data from the system by typing these commands.

conduct.title: Code of Honor
rules: Treat your team with respect (GGWP > Rage).
Zero tolerance for hate speech or harassment.
Focus on having good conversations, making friends, and climbing the rank in the process.

support.title: Built by the Community
support.description: Voice League is an Open Source project. You can help keep the servers running or suggest new features directly in the code.
support.footerNote: Every amount raised is fully reinvested in infrastructure. Distributed under MIT License.

footer.copyright: © 2024 Voice League by <linkAutor>Dev-Etto</linkAutor>. Inspired by League of Legends.
